extension.description: AI assistant for Xynapse IDE with YandexGPT and GigaChat support
command.focusInput: Add Highlighted Code to Context and Clear Chat
command.shareSession: Share Current Chat Session as Markdown
command.writeDocstringForCode: Write a Docstring for this Code
config.title: Xynapse
config.telemetryEnabled: Xynapse collects anonymous usage data, cleaned of PII, to help us improve the product for our users. Read more at [xynapse.dev > Telemetry](https://docs.xynapse.dev/telemetry).
config.telemetryDeprecation: This setting is deprecated and will be removed in a later version. Please use the _Telemetry > Allow Anonymous Telemetry_ setting in the extension's User Settings page.
config.telemetryDeprecationPlain: Please use the _Telemetry > Allow Anonymous Telemetry_ setting in the extension's User Settings page.
config.showInlineTip: Show inline suggestion to use the Xynapse keyboard shortcuts (e.g. "Cmd/Ctrl L to select code, Cmd/Ctrl I to edit").
config.enableQuickActions: Enable the experimental Quick Actions feature. Read our walkthrough to learn about configuration and how to share feedback: [xynapse.dev > Walkthrough: Quick Actions (experimental)](https://docs.xynapse.dev/customize/deep-dives/vscode-actions#quick-actions)
config.enableTabAutocomplete: Enable Xynapse tab autocomplete feature. Read our walkthrough to learn about configuration and how to share feedback: [xynapse.dev > Walkthrough: Tab Autocomplete (beta)](https://docs.xynapse.dev/features/tab-autocomplete)
config.enableNextEdit: Enable Xynapse next edit feature. Read our docs to learn about configuration and how to share feedback: [xynapse.dev > Features > Autocomplete > Next Edit (experimental)](https://docs.xynapse.dev/features/autocomplete/next-edit)
config.pauseTabAutocompleteOnBattery: Pause Xynapse tab autocomplete feature when your battery is low.
config.pauseCodebaseIndexOnStart: Pause Xynapse codebase index on start.
config.enableConsole: Enable a console to log and explore model inputs and outputs. It can be found in the bottom panel.
config.remoteConfigServerUrl: If your team is set up to use shared configuration, enter the server URL here and your user token below to enable automatic syncing.
config.userToken: If your team is set up to use shared configuration, enter your user token here and your server URL above to enable automatic syncing.
config.remoteConfigSyncPeriod: The period of time in minutes between automatic syncs.
config.ideLanguage: IDE display language. Changes the locale in argv.json and requires a restart.
config.assistantLanguage: Language that Xynapse Assistant responds in. Changes prompts and rules in config.yaml.
config.yandexGptApiKey: YandexGPT API key (IAM token or API key from Yandex Cloud console). Applied to all YandexGPT models in config.yaml.
config.yandexGptFolderId: Yandex Cloud folder ID for YandexGPT. Find it in Yandex Cloud console → Resource Manager.
config.gigaChatApiKey: GigaChat authorization key (Base64 client_id:client_secret from developers.sber.ru). Applied to all GigaChat models in config.yaml.
config.autoAcceptEdits: Automatically accept inline edit diffs without showing the accept/reject dialog. Useful for shadow mode workflow.
walkthrough.title: Xynapse IDE
walkthrough.description: Get started with Xynapse IDE and AI Assistant
walkthrough.welcome.title: Welcome to Xynapse IDE
walkthrough.welcome.description:
Learn what Xynapse can do for you.

[Open Xynapse Panel](command:xynapse.focusInput)
walkthrough.profile.title: Create Your Profile
walkthrough.profile.description:
Set up your local Xynapse profile — no cloud registration needed.

[Set Up Profile](command:xynapse.profile.setup)
walkthrough.models.title: Configure AI Models
walkthrough.models.description:
Add your AI models: OpenAI, YandexGPT, GigaChat, or any compatible provider.

[Open Config](command:xynapse.openConfigFile)
walkthrough.shortcuts.title: Learn Shortcuts
walkthrough.shortcuts.description: Master the essential keyboard shortcuts for chat, editing, and autocomplete.
